mergewith.subtemplate:
<branchRateModel id="OptimisedRelaxedClock.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.branchratemodel.UCRelaxedClockModel" rates="@ORCRates.c:$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)"> <distr idref="ORCRateLogNormal.c:$(n)" /> <parameter id="ORCucldMean.c:$(n)" estimate="false" name="clock.rate" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal">1.0</parameter> </branchRateModel>
<parameter id="ORCsigma.c:$(n)" name="stateNode" spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam' domain="PositiveReal">0.2</parameter> <parameter id="ORCRates.c:$(n)" name="stateNode" spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam' domain="PositiveReal">0.5</parameter>
<distribution id='ORCRatePriorDistribution.c:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.IID' param='@ORCRates.c:$(n)' > <distr id="ORCRateLogNormal.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.LogNormal" meanInRealSpace="true" S="@ORCsigma.c:$(n)"> <M spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" estimate="false">1</M> </distr> </distribution>
<distribution id="ORCsigmaPrior.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma" param="@ORCsigma.c:$(n)"> <alpha spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="5" estimate='false'/> <!-- shape --> <theta spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.05" estimate='false'/> <!-- scale --> </distribution>
<distribution id="ORCucldMeanPrior.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma" param="@ORCucldMean.c:$(n)"> <alpha spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.01" estimate='false'/> <!-- shape --> <theta spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="100" estimate='false'/> <!-- scale --> </distribution>
<operator id="ORCucldMeanScaler.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator" parameter="@ORCucldMean.c:$(n)" scaleFactor="0.5" weight="3.0"/> <operator id="ORC.UpDown.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.operator.kernel.BactrianUpDownOperator" scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3.0"> <up idref="ORCucldMean.c:$(n)"/> <down idref="Tree.t:$(n)"/> </operator>
<operator id="ORCAdaptableOperatorSampler_sigma.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.operator.AdaptableOperatorSampler" weight="3.0"> <parameter idref="ORCsigma.c:$(n)" /> <operator id="ORCUcldStdevScale.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator" scaleFactor="0.5" parameter="@ORCsigma.c:$(n)" weight="1"> <kernelDistribution spec="beast.base.inference.operator.kernel.KernelDistribution$Bactrian" m="0.95" mode="bactrian_normal"/> </operator> <operator id="ORCSampleFromPriorOperator_sigma.c:$(n)" spec="orc.operators.SampleFromPriorOperator" parameter="@ORCsigma.c:$(n)" prior="@ORCsigmaPrior.c:$(n)" weight="1"/> </operator>
<operator id="ORCAdaptableOperatorSampler_rates_root.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.operator.AdaptableOperatorSampler" parameter="@ORCRates.c:$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" weight="1.0"> <operator id="ORCRootOperator1.c:$(n)" spec="orc.consoperators.SimpleDistance" twindowSize="0.005" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" clockModel="@OptimisedRelaxedClock.c:$(n)" rates="@ORCRates.c:$(n)" weight="1"> <kernel spec="beast.base.inference.operator.kernel.KernelDistribution$Bactrian" m="0.95" mode="bactrian_normal"/> </operator> <operator id="ORCRootOperator2.c:$(n)" spec="orc.consoperators.SmallPulley" dwindowSize="0.005" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" clockModel="@OptimisedRelaxedClock.c:$(n)" rates="@ORCRates.c:$(n)" weight="1"> <kernel spec="beast.base.inference.operator.kernel.KernelDistribution$Bactrian" m="0.95" mode="bactrian_normal"/> </operator> </operator>
<operator id="ORCAdaptableOperatorSampler_rates_internal.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.operator.AdaptableOperatorSampler" parameter="@ORCRates.c:$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" weight="20"> <operator id="ORCInternalnodesOperator.c:$(n)" spec="orc.consoperators.InConstantDistanceOperator" twindowSize="0.005" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" clockModel="@OptimisedRelaxedClock.c:$(n)" rates="@ORCRates.c:$(n)" weight="1"> <kernel spec="beast.base.inference.operator.kernel.KernelDistribution$Bactrian" m="0.95" mode="bactrian_normal"/> </operator> <operator id="ORCRatesScale.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator" scaleFactor="0.5" parameter="@ORCRates.c:$(n)" weight="1"> <kernelDistribution spec="beast.base.inference.operator.kernel.KernelDistribution$Bactrian" m="0.95" mode="bactrian_normal"/> </operator> <operator id="ORCSampleFromPriorOperator.rates.c:$(n)" spec="orc.operators.SampleFromPriorOperator" parameter="@ORCRates.c:$(n)" np="1" prior="@ORCRatePriorDistribution.c:$(n)" weight="1"/> </operator>
<operator id="ORCNER_dAE_dBE_dCE.c:$(n)" spec="orc.ner.NEROperator_dAE_dBE_dCE" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" rates="@ORCRates.c:$(n)" weight="5"/>
<log id="ORCRatesStat.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.evolution.RateStatistic" branchratemodel="@OptimisedRelaxedClock.c:$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)"/>
Scale clock rate of partition c:$(n)
Updown operator for clock rate and tree of partition c:$(n)
Adaptive weight operator for the relaxed clock standard deviation of partition c:$(n)
Adaptive weight operator for the root node and incident branch rates of partition c:$(n)
Adaptive weight operator for the internal nodes and branch rates of partition c:$(n)
Narrow Exchange Rates operator for the tree of partition c:$(n)
Optimised lognormal relaxed clock stdev of partition c:$(n)
Optimised lognormal relaxed clock mean of partition c:$(n)
Optimised lognormal relaxed clock rates of partition c:$(n)
